currentPlan.title: Current Plan
currentPlan.noSubscriptionDesc: Choose a plan below to get started

confirmModal.title: Confirm Payment
confirmModal.heading: Please confirm your subscription details:
confirmModal.paymentInfoDesc: A payment prompt will be sent to your phone. Please enter your PIN to complete the payment.
confirmModal.phoneNumberHelp: Enter your mobile money number without the country code
confirmModal.phoneNumberError: Please enter a valid 9-digit phone number

paymentModal.checkPhone: Please check your phone for a payment prompt
paymentModal.step1: Check your phone for a USSD prompt
paymentModal.step3: Confirm the payment amount and details
paymentModal.step4: Wait for confirmation (this page will update automatically)
paymentModal.processing: This may take a few moments to process...
paymentModal.successDesc: Your subscription has been activated. You can now enjoy all the features of your selected plan.
paymentModal.accountUpgraded: Your account has been upgraded successfully!
paymentModal.autoCloseMessage: This modal will close automatically in a few seconds...
paymentModal.failedReasons: Your payment could not be processed. This might be due to:
paymentModal.reason1: Insufficient balance in your mobile money account
paymentModal.checkBalance: Please check your mobile money balance and try again or contact support if you need assistance.
